data.body: Grounded the pydantic-ai timeout API for child 02cd: v1.107.0 uses ModelSettings.timeout (httpx request timeout); NO inactivity_timeout on run_sync. DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_S=600 == SDK default. Refutes epic review [T1]. Also: 2440 item3 (api-stability version) is already handled by test_version_sync.py (ticket 9f40) → descoped. Local interpreter is py3.14.6 (d13e's 3.13 proof relies on CI).
